## Happy paths

| HP-1 | | | | | P0 | yes |

---

## Edge cases

| ID | Scenario | Input | Expected | Priority | Automated |
|----|----------|-------|----------|----------|-----------|
| E-1 | Empty input | "" | Validation message | P1 | yes |
| E-2 | Maximum length | 256 chars | Validation message | P1 | yes |
| E-3 | Unicode / emoji | "🚀@example.com" | Handled correctly | P2 | yes |
| E-4 | Special characters | "test'or'1='1" | Sanitized | P0 | yes |

---

## Error handling

| ID | Scenario | Failure injected | Expected user experience | Priority | Automated |
|----|----------|------------------|--------------------------|----------|-----------|
| ER-1 | Network offline | Disable network | Clear message; preserves input | P1 | yes |
| ER-2 | Server 500 | Mock 500 | Friendly message; logged for debug | P1 | yes |
| ER-3 | Rate limited | 10+ attempts | Cool-down message; clear next steps | P1 | yes |

---

## Empty / first-use states

| ID | State | Expected | Priority |
|----|-------|----------|----------|
| EM-1 | First use, no data | Friendly empty state with CTA | P1 |
| EM-2 | After delete last item | Returns to empty state, not error | P1 |

---

## Concurrent / race scenarios (if applicable)

| ID | Scenario | Actors | Expected | Priority |
|----|----------|--------|----------|----------|
| C-1 | Two users edit same record | A + B | Consistent end state; conflict UX | P0 |
| C-2 | Idempotent submit | Same submit twice | No duplicate effect | P0 |

---

## Accessibility

| ID | Scenario | Method | Expected | Priority |
|----|----------|--------|----------|----------|
| A-1 | Keyboard-only nav | Tab through | All elements reachable; logical order | P1 |
| A-2 | Screen reader | VoiceOver | Meaningful labels | P1 |
| A-3 | High contrast | OS setting on | Readable; no color-only signals | P1 |
| A-4 | Reduced motion | OS setting on | Motion reduced | P2 |

---

## Security

| ID | Scenario | Method | Expected | Priority |
|----|----------|--------|----------|----------|
| SE-1 | XSS attempt | <script> in field | Escaped on display | P0 |
| SE-2 | SQL injection | ' OR '1'='1 | Sanitized | P0 |
| SE-3 | Unauthorized access | Logged-out request | 401 + redirect | P0 |
| SE-4 | PII not in logs | Trigger action | Audit logs; PII redacted | P0 |
| SE-5 | Brute-force protection | Rapid submits | Rate-limited | P0 |

---

| ID | Scenario | Load | Expected | Priority |
|----|----------|------|----------|----------|
| P-1 | P95 latency | 1000 concurrent | < 500ms | P1 |
| P-2 | Large data | 10K items | Renders responsively | P1 |
